title: 2026 rebalance — drift back to 70/20/10 target weights
description: The annual drift check came in hot: US equity crept to 76% on the VTI run. Walk the book back to 70/20/10 (US / intl / bonds) with new contributions first, sales last — taxes are a headwind, not a wall. Children carry the mechanical steps.

title: Route new 401k contributions to international until VXUS hits 20%
description: Contribution-first rebalancing: zero tax drag, just slower. Payroll change filed.
close_reason: Payroll election updated — 100% of new contributions to the international sleeve until the 20% target is met (est. 5 months at current rates).

comments.author: concierge
comments.text: Confirmed the plan administrator applied the new election starting with the July 15 paycheck.

title: Harvest the VXUS lot bought at the March high
description: The 40-share March lot sits ~8% under water — a clean tax-loss harvest candidate IF the wash window is clear. Sell, bank the loss, replace with a non-identical intl fund for 31 days.

title: Confirm no VXUS purchases inside the ±30d wash window
description: The dividend-reinvestment flag is the classic trap — an auto-reinvested $40 dividend washes the whole harvest. Audit both accounts' DRIP settings and the last 30 days of fills before nest-r3 sells anything.

title: 20th-anniversary trip — shortlist to booked
description: October window, 9 nights, premium-cabin flights on points if the award space exists. Shortlist is Kona / Barcelona / Denver; decision gate is the award-seat scan.

title: Scan award-seat availability for the October window
description: Points-first: the premium-cabin award space decides the destination, not the other way round.
close_reason: Scan complete: Kona has 2 first-class award seats on the target dates; Barcelona is waitlist-only; Denver requires a cash fare. Kona leads.

comments.author: scout
comments.text: Award space verified on both outbound and return. Holds expire in 14 days — booking decision needed before then.

title: Book flights + anchor hotel for the winning city
description: Blocked on the destination decision. The award holds expire 14 days after the scan — this carries a real deadline.

title: Rooftop solar — quotes to interconnection
description: Three quotes in hand; the 30% federal credit plus the utility's net-metering rate makes the payback ~9 years. Panel install is gated on the roof inspection passing.

title: Roof inspection — 15-year-old shingles under 25-year panels
description: Panels outlive the shingles under them — re-roofing AFTER install doubles the cost. Inspect first.
close_reason: Inspection passed: shingles have 12+ years of serviceable life left, no re-roof needed before install. Installer's structural engineer countersigned.

title: Sign the installer contract + schedule the install window
description: SunCrest's quote wins on the inverter warranty. Contract in review; targeting an August install.

title: Quarterly review of the senior-PM watchlist
description: The passive career watch: re-rank the watchlist companies against the openings scan; flag anything worth an actual conversation.

title: Renew the umbrella policy before the August lapse
description: The $2M umbrella lapses 8/1; the renewal quote came in 6% higher — shop it once, then renew.
close_reason: Renewed at the incumbent after two competing quotes came back higher. Locked for 12 months; calendar reminder set for next June.

title: Read the new 529-to-Roth rollover rules before September
description: The overfunded 529 might convert up to the lifetime cap — worth an hour with the primary sources before the September contribution decision.

title: Compare HELOC rates for the kitchen remodel float
description: Only if the remodel goes ahead this year — parked until the solar contract lands.

title: Consolidate the two old-employer 401k accounts
description: Two orphaned accounts, one with above-average fund fees. Roll both into the IRA.
